import React from 'react'; const FACTS = [ { icon: '🎓', label: 'Education', value: 'B.Tech Computer Science, 2020' }, { icon: '💼', label: 'Experience', value: '4+ Years in Full-Stack Dev' }, { icon: '📍', label: 'Location', value: 'Bangalore, India' }, { icon: '🌐', label: 'Languages', value: 'English, Hindi, Telugu' }, ]; function About() { return (
{/* Left — image card */}
AM
✦ Open to opportunities
{/* Right — text */}

About me

Turning ideas into
living products

Hi, I'm Alex Morgan — a full-stack developer with a passion for building products that sit at the intersection of great engineering and thoughtful design. I specialise in the React ecosystem on the front-end and Node.js / Python on the back-end.

I believe good software is invisible — it just works, and feels delightful to use. When I'm not coding, you'll find me reading about distributed systems, tinkering with 3D graphics, or making a decent cup of pour-over coffee.

{/* Quick facts grid */}
{FACTS.map(f => (
{f.icon}
{f.label}
{f.value}
))}
Download Résumé ↓
); } export default About;
